metadata.description: Issue-driven development pipeline: /explore an idea into a planned issue, /implement-issue to ship it

plugins.name: pipeline-core
plugins.description: Explore→issue→implement→PR engine with GitHub/GitLab/Jira support. Assumes the superpowers plugin is installed for methodology skills (TDD, debugging, planning).

plugins.name: pipeline-frontend
plugins.description: Web stack pack: UI design fundamentals, frontend review, Playwright testing, React and Playwright agents
